data.name: 精靈嬌妻洛蕾塔
data.detailed_description:
When Elio, a politician who's living a happy and peaceful life with his wife, Loretta, takes up the position of editor-in-chief of his party's paper, trouble arises as a new writer, Fabro, joins the group. Fabro didn't come to the party to help Elio... quite the contrary, actually. He has his eyes set on Elio's position, and he's ready and willing to do anything to get it—including making Loretta his pawn. What will become of Loretta's brand-new job as Elio's secretary? And how will Elio thwart Fabro's diabolical schemes?

Discover a beautiful town set in the 1900s as you explore its streets and speak with the locals. Elio must stop Fabro from realizing his diabolical plans, and it's up to you to investigate the town and uncover the truth from your fellow citizens! Experience a traditional slice-of-life RPG while you unearth the truths hidden behind Fabro's deceit. Stop Fabro and don't let him steal your position in the party!
data.about_the_game:
When Elio, a politician who's living a happy and peaceful life with his wife, Loretta, takes up the position of editor-in-chief of his party's paper, trouble arises as a new writer, Fabro, joins the group. And how will Elio thwart Fabro's diabolical schemes?

Discover a beautiful town set in the 1900s as you explore its streets and speak with the locals. Experience a traditional slice-of-life RPG while you unearth the truths hidden behind Fabro's deceit. Stop Fabro and don't let him steal your position in the party!
data.short_description: Elio's peaceful life undergoes a dramatic change as he takes on the role of editor-in-chief of his party's paper!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and AVANTGARDE, All Rights Reserved.
